016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
019
020/**
021 * Interface for transaction fee calculation.
022 */
023public interface FeeCalculator {
024    /**
025     * Calculate the fee for an almost-complete transaction. The proposed transaction
026     * should contain all inputs and outputs. Typically, this means having a change output
027     * with a value of {@link Coin#ZERO}. After calculating the correct fee the change output
028     * should be updated with the correct amount.
029     *
030     * @param proposedTx A nearly-complete proposed transaction.
031     * @return A recommended fee for this transaction.
032     */
033    Coin calculateFee(SigningRequest proposedTx);
034}
